Seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well.
Let your light shine before others, that they may see your good deeds.
Ask and it will be given to you; seek and you will find; knock and the door will be opened to you.
Love your neighbor as yourself.
Do to others as you would have them do to you.
With God all things are possible.
Do not judge, or you too will be judged.
No one can serve two masters.
Do not worry about your life.
Whoever wants to be first must be servant of all.
Unless you become like little children, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven.
Where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.
Greater love has no one than this: to lay down one’s life for one’s friends.
Those who exalt themselves will be humbled, and those who humble themselves will be exalted.
Whatever you ask for in prayer, believe that you have received it.
Forgive others so that your Father may forgive you.
Do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about itself.
Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you.
Take heart! I have overcome the world.
My yoke is easy and my burden is light.
Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you. I do not give to you as the world gives.
If the Son sets you free, you will be free indeed.
You will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.
Whoever wants to save their life will lose it, but whoever loses their life for me will find it.
What good will it be for someone to gain the whole world, yet forfeit their soul?
Watch and pray so that you will not fall into temptation. The spirit is willing, but the flesh is weak.
Blessed are the meek, for they will inherit the earth.
Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God.
Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, for they will be filled.
If someone slaps you on one cheek, turn to them the other also.
Give to the one who asks you, and do not turn away from the one who wants to borrow from you.
Why do you worry about the speck in someone else’s eye and pay no attention to the plank in your own eye?
Make every effort to enter through the narrow door.
Whoever can be trusted with very little can also be trusted with much.
From everyone who has been given much, much will be demanded.
The one who is faithful in little is faithful in much.
Let the one who is without sin cast the first stone.
Your faith has made you well.
Do not be afraid; just believe.
You are in danger of living a life so comfortable and soft that you will die without ever realizing your true potential.
When you think you’re done, you’re only at 40% of your capability.
Don’t stop when you’re tired. Stop when you’re done.
Be more than motivated, be more than driven — become literally obsessed to the point where people think you’re crazy.
No one is going to come help you. No one’s coming to save you.
The most important conversations you’ll ever have are the ones you’ll have with yourself.
You have to build calluses on your brain just like how you build calluses on your hands.
Pain unlocks a secret doorway in the mind.
We all have the ability to come from nothing to something.
Tell yourself the truth. That’s where growth begins.
If you can get through doing things you hate to do, on the other side is greatness.
Comfort is the enemy of achievement.
Denial is the ultimate comfort zone.
Most people quit when they’re tired. You must learn to push past that.
Suffering is the true test of life.
